bird.name: Wetar ground dove
bird.summary: The Wetar ground dove (Pampusana hoedtii) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae found on Wetar, Indonesia, and on Timor. Its natura…

locations.name: 帝汶島
locations.summary: 帝汶島（印尼語：Pulau Timor，葡萄牙語：Ilha de Timor）是位於馬來群島南端的島嶼，為小巽他群島中面積最大者，總面積約30,777平方公里。該島地處東南亞海域，座標約為9°14′S 124°56′E，北臨弗洛勒斯海，南…

relations.subject: Wetar ground dove
relations.evidence: The species is found in Wetar and Timor. Fewer than 20 birds were collected on Wetar around 1900, and there were many records in 2008 and 2009

relations.subject: Wetar ground dove
relations.evidence: Threatened by habitat loss and hunting, the species is assessed as endangered by the IUCN
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Wetar ground dove
relations.evidence: Threatened by habitat loss and hunting, the species is assessed as endangered by the IUCN
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
